name: emoji-search
title: Emoji Search
description: Search and paste local QQ/WeChat stickers from the emoji_search FastAPI service.
author: adam

commands.name: search-emoji
commands.title: Search Emoji
commands.description: Search local sticker captions and paste or copy the image.

commands.name: open-catalog
commands.title: Open Emoji Catalog
commands.description: Open the local CSV catalog for manual tags.

commands.name: sync-index
commands.title: Sync Emoji Index
commands.description: Ask the local backend to sync missing and stale vectors.

preferences.name: projectRoot
preferences.title: Project Root
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to the emoji_search project. Leave blank when running this extension from raycast/emoji-search.

preferences.name: topK
preferences.title: Result Count
preferences.description: Maximum results returned from semantic search.
